code:
import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)

    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)

    tile_ids = state.grid[:, :, 0]
    tile_colors = state.grid[:, :, 1]

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    yy_f = yy.astype(jnp.float32)
    xx_f = xx.astype(jnp.float32)

    # --- Direction one-hot ---
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)

    # --- Pocket ---
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 3) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 2)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pocket_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[0], 13)
    pocket_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[1], 12)

    # --- Blue pyramid (tile=5, color=3) ---
    blue_pyr_mask = (tile_ids == 5) & (tile_colors == 3)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_exists = jnp.clip(blue_pyr_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    rel_pyr_y = (blue_pyr_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_pyr_x = (blue_pyr_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_pyr = (jnp.abs(blue_pyr_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(blue_pyr_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # --- Yellow hex (tile=11, color=5) ---
    yel_hex_mask = (tile_ids == 11) & (tile_colors == 5)
    yel_hex_count = jnp.sum(yel_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yel_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_exists = jnp.clip(yel_hex_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    rel_hex_y = (yel_hex_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_hex_x = (yel_hex_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_hex = (jnp.abs(yel_hex_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(yel_hex_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # --- Front tile ---
    dy_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_f, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_f, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_ids[front_y, front_x], 13)
    front_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_colors[front_y, front_x], 12)
    front_is_blue_pyr = ((tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 5) & (tile_colors[front_y, front_x] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_floor = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 1).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_closed_door = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 9).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_locked_door = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 8).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_to_hex_dist = (jnp.abs(front_y.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_y) +
                         jnp.abs(front_x.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_x))
    front_adj_hex = (front_to_hex_dist <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_floor_adj_hex = front_is_floor * front_adj_hex
    can_pickup_now = front_is_blue_pyr * pocket_empty
    can_place_now = holding_green_ball * front_floor_adj_hex

    # --- Task phase ---
    phase_pickup = blue_pyr_exists * pocket_empty
    phase_place = holding_green_ball
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 400.0

    # --- Nearest floor tile adjacent to yellow hex (placement target) ---
    adj_to_hex = (jnp.abs(yy_f - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(xx_f - yel_hex_x)) == 1.0
    floor_adj_hex = adj_to_hex & (tile_ids == 1)
    floor_adj_count = jnp.sum(floor_adj_hex).astype(jnp.float32)
    place_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * floor_adj_hex) / jnp.maximum(floor_adj_count, 1.0)
    place_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * floor_adj_hex) / jnp.maximum(floor_adj_count, 1.0)
    rel_place_y = (place_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_place_x = (place_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_place = (jnp.abs(place_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(place_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # --- Agent adjacency ---
    agent_adj_hex = ((jnp.abs(agent_y - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - yel_hex_x)) <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_adj_pyr = ((jnp.abs(agent_y - blue_pyr_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - blue_pyr_x)) <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_adj_place = ((jnp.abs(agent_y - place_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - place_x)) <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # --- Door info ---
    closed_door_mask = (tile_ids == 9)
    locked_door_mask = (tile_ids == 8)
    open_door_mask = (tile_ids == 10)
    all_blockable = closed_door_mask | locked_door_mask
    n_closed = jnp.sum(closed_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_open = jnp.sum(open_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Nearest blockable door to agent
    dist_to_all = jnp.abs(yy_f - agent_y) + jnp.abs(xx_f - agent_x)
    door_dist_masked = jnp.where(all_blockable, dist_to_all, 9999.0)
    nearest_door_flat = jnp.argmin(door_dist_masked)
    nearest_door_y = (nearest_door_flat // W).astype(jnp.float32)
    nearest_door_x = (nearest_door_flat % W).astype(jnp.float32)
    rel_nearest_door_y = (nearest_door_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_nearest_door_x = (nearest_door_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    nearest_door_dist_norm = jnp.min(door_dist_masked) / (H_f + W_f - 2)
    has_blockable_door = (jnp.sum(all_blockable) > 0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Nearest open door to agent
    open_dist_masked = jnp.where(open_door_mask, dist_to_all, 9999.0)
    nearest_open_flat = jnp.argmin(open_dist_masked)
    nearest_open_y = (nearest_open_flat // W).astype(jnp.float32)
    nearest_open_x = (nearest_open_flat % W).astype(jnp.float32)
    rel_nearest_open_y = (nearest_open_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_nearest_open_x = (nearest_open_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)

    # --- Room quadrant ---
    mid_y = H_f / 2.0
    mid_x = W_f / 2.0
    agent_room_tl = ((agent_y < mid_y) & (agent_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_room_tr = ((agent_y < mid_y) & (agent_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_room_bl = ((agent_y >= mid_y) & (agent_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_room_br = ((agent_y >= mid_y) & (agent_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)

    pyr_room_tl = ((blue_pyr_y < mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_room_tr = ((blue_pyr_y < mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_room_bl = ((blue_pyr_y >= mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_room_br = ((blue_pyr_y >= mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)

    hex_room_tl = ((yel_hex_y < mid_y) & (yel_hex_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_room_tr = ((yel_hex_y < mid_y) & (yel_hex_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_room_bl = ((yel_hex_y >= mid_y) & (yel_hex_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_room_br = ((yel_hex_y >= mid_y) & (yel_hex_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)

    same_room_pyr = (agent_room_tl * pyr_room_tl + agent_room_tr * pyr_room_tr +
                     agent_room_bl * pyr_room_bl + agent_room_br * pyr_room_br)
    same_room_hex = (agent_room_tl * hex_room_tl + agent_room_tr * hex_room_tr +
                     agent_room_bl * hex_room_bl + agent_room_br * hex_room_br)

    # --- Structured features ---
    structured = jnp.concatenate([
        # Agent (6)
        jnp.array([agent_y / (H_f - 1), agent_x / (W_f - 1)]),
        dir_oh,

        # Pocket (13 + 12 + 4 = 29)
        pocket_tile_oh,
        pocket_color_oh,
        jnp.array([pocket_empty, holding_green_ball, phase_pickup, phase_place]),

        # Blue pyramid (8)
        jnp.array([blue_pyr_y / (H_f - 1), blue_pyr_x / (W_f - 1),
                   rel_pyr_y, rel_pyr_x,
                   dist_pyr, blue_pyr_exists, agent_adj_pyr, can_pickup_now]),

        # Yellow hex (7)
        jnp.array([yel_hex_y / (H_f - 1), yel_hex_x / (W_f - 1),
                   rel_hex_y, rel_hex_x,
                   dist_hex, yel_hex_exists, agent_adj_hex]),

        # Placement target (5)
        jnp.array([rel_place_y, rel_place_x, dist_place, agent_adj_place, can_place_now]),

        # Front tile (13 + 12 + 6 = 31)
        front_tile_oh,
        front_color_oh,
        jnp.array([front_is_blue_pyr, front_is_floor,
                   front_is_closed_door, front_is_locked_door,
                   front_adj_hex, front_floor_adj_hex]),

        # Door navigation (8)
        jnp.array([rel_nearest_door_y, rel_nearest_door_x, nearest_door_dist_norm, has_blockable_door,
                   rel_nearest_open_y, rel_nearest_open_x, n_closed / 4.0, n_open / 4.0]),

        # Room info (14)
        jnp.array([agent_room_tl, agent_room_tr, agent_room_bl, agent_room_br,
                   pyr_room_tl, pyr_room_tr, pyr_room_bl, pyr_room_br,
                   hex_room_tl, hex_room_tr, hex_room_bl, hex_room_br,
                   same_room_pyr, same_room_hex]),

        # Step (1)
        jnp.array([step_norm]),
    ])
    # 6 + 29 + 8 + 7 + 5 + 31 + 8 + 14 + 1 = 109

    # --- Full grid tile IDs and colors (normalized) ---
    full_tile_norm = tile_ids.astype(jnp.float32).flatten() / 12.0   # 169
    full_color_norm = tile_colors.astype(jnp.float32).flatten() / 11.0  # 169

    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        structured,       # 109
        full_tile_norm,   # 169
        full_color_norm,  # 169
    ])
    # Total: 447

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)
